title: Missouri DDS Pay-Scale Research Notes
description: Narrative research notes for Missouri DDS pay: administering agency (DESE Office of Adult Learning and Rehabilitation Services — NOT the Dept of Social Services), examiner class title NOT located in public OA classification records, two related-but-distinct OA classes (#0866 Disability Program Representative Grade 06 $36,360–$57,792; #0868 Disability Program Specialist Grade 07 $41,208–$65,544, both serving the Governor's Council on Disability, not DESE DDS), the OA Uniform Classification and Pay System, limited bargaining, and large data gaps. Markdown-only state (no sibling scheduled-rates.json).

source.publisher: Missouri Office of Administration (OA) Division of Personnel; MO Dept of Elementary and Secondary Education (DESE) Office of Adult Learning and Rehabilitation Services
source.title: MO DDS salary research notes (OA Uniform Classification and Pay System; DESE DDS class title not located)

update_cadence: ad hoc (DESE DDS class title not located in public records)
notes: Computed: agency (DESE, not DSS) is confirmed, but the DESE DDS examiner/supervisor class titles and pay grades are NOT located in public OA records — data_quality is very low. The cited dollar figures (#0866 $36,360–$57,792; #0868 $41,208–$65,544) are for related Governor's-Council-on-Disability classes, explicitly NOT the DESE DDS roles. DESE DDS may use an internal classification not publicly indexed. effective_date not stated so temporal_coverage is omitted. No sibling scheduled-rates.json for MO.
